steps.title: Use the shared slope
steps.content:
Parallel lines have the same slope. The line

$$y=38x+5$$

has slope $38$, so line $s$ also has slope $38$.

steps.title: Write the line through the origin
steps.content:
Line $s$ passes through $(0,0)$, so its $y$-intercept is $0$. Its equation is

$$y=38x$$

steps.title: Evaluate at the given point
steps.content:
The point $(6,d)$ is on line $s$, so substitute $x=6$:

$$d=38(6)=228$$

The answer is 228.
